Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}My wallet may be light, and my materials may be cheap...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But I will work hard to make a beautiful kimono and save my future![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I helped Bebe work on the kimono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Hmm... Oui, this is starting to come together! Manzoku![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}When my uncle sees this, I know he'll agree with me about how great Nihon is![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}I believe you, {f 4 2}-dono! Which means I must work even harder![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I don't have the ability to stay that focused.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But I know I can work harder than this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I made so much progress today! And I could not have done it without your help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems truly grateful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I must have overworked them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}But no matter what the cost, I will finish this kimono![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}For my future, for Nihon... I cannot give up now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent the day helping Bebe[n]then went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
